meaning: v.发火花,(使)闪耀,(香槟酒等)发泡,用眼神表达,发光闪烁n.火花,闪光,光彩,活力,发泡
examples: There was a sparkle of excitement in her eyes.
The stars sparkle in the dark sky.
Our headlamps played tricks with colour, turning new spruce tips silver and making a lichen-shagged tree sparkle.
"Maybe he can teleport over by the sparkle of his teeth, " said Ms. Tallichet.
